pictures.alt_text: School Safety Center logo featuring a gold beehive inside a dark blue shield with "SCHOOL SAFETY CENTER" text in orange and black lettering to the right.

A professional design layout with "Version 1" text featuring a black and white photograph of three people in a business setting overlaid with geometric teal and navy chevron shapes and vertical stripe pattern.
Logo for the Utah State Board of Education featuring a white flame symbol and white text on a blue background.
Illustration showing four diverse students of different ethnicities among plants and nature with an open book, beneath the text "Safe and Healthy School Environment" in a banner.

A table tracking school safety and security statutory requirements across five columns: "Statutory Requirement," "Existing Requirements," "New in Leg. Session 2023," "New in Leg. Session 2024," and "Ongoing," with rows for Armed and Trained School Personnel, Behavioral Threat Assessment, Building and Safety Standards, County Security Chief, Emergency Response Plans, and Emergency Evacuation Drills, using Yes/No values to indicate implementation status.

A table comparing statutory school safety and security requirements across five categories: existing requirements, new in 2023 legislative session, new in 2024 legislative session, and ongoing, showing Yes/No values for seven types of requirements including a LEA School Safety Director, multidisciplinary team, specialist position, needs assessment, response protocol, and panic buttons.
Illustration of two smiling professionals in conversation: a police officer in light blue uniform on the left and a worker in white uniform with orange cap on the right, both shown from the torso up.
Illustration of a smiling worker wearing a light blue short-sleeved shirt with pockets, dark tie, and utility belt, standing with arms crossed.

Illustration of a person holding a large pencil pointing to a clipboard displaying a "Safety ASSESSMENT" checklist with red checkmarks and unchecked items, accompanied by a magnifying glass, gears, plants, and a warning icon.
Illustration of three diverse people standing on an open palm with a protective shield icon above them and a leafy background, symbolizing care, support, or security.
A bright pink prohibition symbol (circle with diagonal line) containing the text "STOP BULLYING" with the word "BULLYING" crossed out by the diagonal line, conveying an anti-bullying message.

An illustration showing diverse people working around a checklist with a security shield and checkmark icon, a first aid kit, and warning triangle, surrounded by decorative plants, representing workplace health, safety, or security compliance themes.
An orange brick school building with white-framed windows, a central gabled entrance labeled "SCHOOL," and green landscaping on either side, set against a light blue sky.
Blue icon showing a serious-faced person's head next to a theatrical comedy/tragedy mask symbol, representing theater, performance, or emotional expression.
Two blue silhouetted figures facing each other with a speech bubble containing three dots, depicting communication or conversation between two people.
An icon depicting a silhouetted head profile on the left with a magnifying glass and checkmark, representing user verification or quality inspection.
A dark blue icon depicting two fists positioned toward each other in a gesture of solidarity or teamwork.
A blue icon depicting a warning triangle with an exclamation mark on the left and a bomb or explosive symbol on the right, representing danger, risk, or a critical alert.
A sequence of five diverse people of varying ages walks and runs rightward toward a woman holding open a door marked "EXIT," illustrating emergency evacuation procedures.

An illustration of two people having a discussion at a table—one in a wheelchair wearing an orange shirt on the left, one in a blue shirt on the right—with a document and a chart icon visible, representing inclusive workplace collaboration.

Illustration of four diverse people collaborating in a hybrid work environment: an older adult at a laptop, a woman on a video call screen, a man holding a tablet looking confused, and a young person pointing, with green plants as decorative elements.
A QR code with three position markers in the corners and a matrix pattern of black and white squares in the center.
